title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing, analyzing why the company is going public before OpenAI and examining Claude's competitive position. The conversation covers strategic implications and questions about the company's capital needs.
